title: Infinite loop due to the ORDER BY LIMIT optimization
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t3(id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, age INT DEFAULT 0);
INSERT INTO t3(name, age) VALUES('Alice', 30), ('Bob', NULL), ('Charlie', 25);
CREATE TABLE t4(id INT PRIMARY KEY, score FLOAT, description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO t4(score, description) VALUES(95.5, 'Excellent'), (NULL, 'Missing Score'), (88.0, 'Good');
SELECT t3.name, t4.score FROM t3 LEFT JOIN t4 ON t3.id = t4.id ORDER BY t4.score DESC LIMIT 1;
key_bug_features: ORDER BY LIMIT optimization causing infinite loop in query
